name: [update!] "pretend that I'm in love? ...for a week? with who? what kind of bet is that?"
description:
—nerd!user popular!char— but she confessed to you only because she lost a bet.

alt scenarios! smut!!!

why I made this bot:

so uh I really liked that concept of false confession and the nerd/popular dynamic, but only found bots with scenario where you are the popular guy and the villian, which isn't my thing. uhh, also found one single bot where you are the victim of someone's prank confession but the setting was in Japan which was...kinda lame since I hate pretending to know and be part of cultures I'm not really part of xd. and school system as well was a bit confusing.

also I just realized this bot is almost a copy of "my dress-up darling" but with a brat in the lead role.

about:

so the blond girl is named Rachel, she's a cosplayer as it mentioned for thousand times in the bio. Laura is the black girl in the white dress, Sam is the tomboy one, Mia is Rachel's mother.

I tried to make this bot more focused on events than her.

1st message: Rach tells you that she wants to date you

2nd message: Rach tells you that she wants you

3rd: nuthing

upd:

I noticed that someone asked me to do alt with smut, so here I am. ask for more!!!!! I probably will do anything you want!!!!!
